prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9968a131`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_9968a131` end-to-end. The verifier treats the first non-background row as the canonical `a,b` ordering, then rewrites any later row with the reversed `b,a` pair by shifting that 3-cell segment one step right so it becomes `bg,b,a`. The summary hint was used only as a loose starting point; it was directionally consistent, so I did not add a corrective `notes.md`. No new shared primitive was needed.
